title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud-based services. By exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines, attackers can deploy malicious code, potentially leading to data encryption, service disruption, and financial losses.
recommended_actions: Immediately review and secure CI/CD pipelines by implementing multi-factor authentication (MFA), access controls, and regular security audits.
Deploy endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to monitor for and mitigate ransomware activity within cloud environments.
Ensure regular backups of critical data are performed and stored securely, separate from the primary cloud infrastructure.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: qdPM 9.1 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to extract...
description: qdPM 9.1 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to extract database information by injecting SQL code through filter_by parameters. Attackers can submit malicious POST requests to the timeReport endpoint with crafted filter_by[CommentCreatedFrom] and filter_by[CommentCreatedTo] parameters to execute arbitrary SQL queries and retrieve sensitive data.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25208.

title: ASP.NET jVideo Kit 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated...
description: ASP.NET jVideo Kit 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to inject SQL commands through the 'query' parameter in the search functionality. Attackers can submit malicious SQL payloads via GET or POST requests to the /search endpoint to extract sensitive database information using boolean-based blind or error-based techniques.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25205.

title: OpenBiz Cubi Lite 3.0.8 contains a SQL injection vulnerability in the login form that allows...
description: OpenBiz Cubi Lite 3.0.8 contains a SQL injection vulnerability in the login form that allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate database queries through the username parameter. Attackers can submit POST requests to /bin/controller.php with malicious SQL code in the username field to extract sensitive database information or bypass authentication.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The SQL injection vulnerability in OpenBiz Cubi Lite 3.0.8's login form allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate database queries, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or complete compromise of the application and its underlying database.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input validation and sanitization on the username parameter to prevent malicious SQL queries.
Update to the latest patched version of OpenBiz Cubi Lite if available, or contact the vendor for a fix.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious SQL injection attempts.

title: KomSeo Cart 1.3 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows attackers to inject SQL...
description: KomSeo Cart 1.3 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows attackers to inject SQL commands through the 'my_item_search' parameter in edit.php. Attackers can submit POST requests with malicious SQL payloads to extract sensitive database information using boolean-based blind or error-based injection techniques.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The SQL injection vulnerability in KomSeo Cart 1.3 allows attackers to extract sensitive database information, potentially leading to data breaches, unauthorized access, and disruption of business operations.
recommended_actions: Immediately update KomSeo Cart to the latest patched version if available.
Implement input validation and sanitization for the 'my_item_search' parameter to prevent malicious SQL payloads.
Conduct a thorough security audit of the application to identify and remediate other potential vulnerabilities.

title: Library CMS 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to...
description: Library CMS 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to bypass authentication by injecting SQL code through the username parameter. Attackers can send POST requests to the admin login endpoint with boolean-based blind SQL injection payloads in the username field to manipulate database queries and gain unauthorized access.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The SQL injection vulnerability in Library CMS 1.0 allows unauthenticated attackers to bypass authentication and gain unauthorized access to sensitive data, potentially compromising the entire database. This could lead to data breaches, data manipulation, or system compromise.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input sanitization and parameterized queries to mitigate SQL injection vulnerabilities.
Update or patch the Library CMS 1.0 system to a secure version, or apply vendor-provided fixes if available.
Implement web application firewalls (WAF) to detect and block malicious SQL injection attempts.

title: Vulnerability related to an unquoted service path in Small HTTP Server 3.06.36, specifically...
description: Vulnerability related to an unquoted service path in Small HTTP Server 3.06.36, specifically affecting the executable located at 'C:\Program Files (x86)\shttps_mg\http.exe service'. This misconfiguration allows a local attacker to place a malicious executable with the same name in a higher priority directory, causing the service to execute the malicious file instead of the legitimate one. Exploiting this flaw could allow arbitrary code execution, unauthorized access to the system, or service dis

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2025-41368.

title: Wecodex Hotel CMS 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability in the admin login functionality...
description: Wecodex Hotel CMS 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability in the admin login functionality that allows unauthenticated attackers to bypass authentication by injecting SQL code. Attackers can submit malicious SQL payloads through the username parameter in POST requests to index.php with action=processlogin to extract sensitive database information or gain unauthorized administrative access.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25195.

title: Online Quiz Maker 1.0 contains SQL injection vulnerabilities in the catid and usern parameters...
description: Online Quiz Maker 1.0 contains SQL injection vulnerabilities in the catid and usern parameters that allow authenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands. Attackers can submit malicious POST requests to quiz-system.php or add-category.php with crafted SQL payloads in POST parameters to extract sensitive database information or bypass authentication.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25207.

title: SAT CFDI 3.3 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows attackers to manipulate database...
description: SAT CFDI 3.3 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows attackers to manipulate database queries by injecting SQL code through the 'id' parameter in the signIn endpoint. Attackers can submit POST requests with boolean-based blind, stacked queries, or time-based blind SQL injection payloads to extract sensitive data or compromise the application.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The SQL injection vulnerability in SAT CFDI 3.3 allows attackers to manipulate database queries, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive data, database corruption, or full compromise of the application. This could result in data breaches, financial losses, and reputational damage.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input validation and sanitization on the 'id' parameter to prevent malicious SQL code execution.
Update the affected application to the latest version or apply patches provided by the vendor to address CVE-2018-25202.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to detect and block SQL injection attempts in real-time.

title: The VSL privileged helper does utilize NSXPC for IPC. The implementation of the ...
description: The VSL privileged helper does utilize NSXPC for IPC. The implementation of the "shouldAcceptNewConnection" function, which is used by the NSXPC framework to validate if a client should be allowed to connect to the XPC listener, does not validate clients at all. This means that any process can connect to this service using the configured protocol. A malicious process is able to call all the functions defined in the corresponding HelperToolProtocol. No validation is performed in the functions "wr

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the VSL privileged helper allows any process to connect to the service without validation, enabling unauthorized access to sensitive functions defined in the HelperToolProtocol. This could lead to privilege escalation, unauthorized data access, or execution of malicious code.
recommended_actions: Immediately patch the affected VSL privileged helper by implementing proper client validation in the 'shouldAcceptNewConnection' function.
Conduct a security audit to identify and mitigate any unauthorized access or exploitation that may have occurred.
Monitor systems for unusual activity and implement stricter access controls to prevent unauthorized processes from exploiting the vulnerability.

title: WebOfisi E-Ticaret 4.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability in the 'urun' GET parameter of the...
description: WebOfisi E-Ticaret 4.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability in the 'urun' GET parameter of the endpoint that allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate database queries. Attackers can inject SQL payloads through the 'urun' parameter to execute boolean-based blind, error-based, time-based blind, and stacked query attacks against the backend database.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25210.

title: School Management System CMS 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability in the admin login...
description: School Management System CMS 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability in the admin login functionality that allows attackers to bypass authentication by injecting SQL code through the username parameter. Attackers can submit malicious payloads using boolean-based blind SQL injection techniques to the processlogin endpoint to authenticate as administrator without valid credentials.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25201.

title: plank/laravel-mediable through version 6.4.0 can allow upload of a dangerous file type when an...
description: plank/laravel-mediable through version 6.4.0 can allow upload of a dangerous file type when an application using the package accepts or prefers a client-supplied MIME type during file upload handling. In that configuration, a remote attacker can submit a file containing executable PHP code while declaring a benign image MIME type, resulting in arbitrary file upload. If the uploaded file is stored in a web-accessible and executable location, this may lead to remote code execution. At the time of

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4809.

title: Vulnerability of incorrect authorization in HiJiffy Chatbot allows an attacker to download...
description: Vulnerability of incorrect authorization in HiJiffy Chatbot allows an attacker to download private messages from other users via the parameter 'ID' in '/api/v1/download/<ID>/'.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the HiJiffy Chatbot allows unauthorized attackers to download private messages of other users, leading to potential data breaches, privacy violations, and reputational damage for affected organizations.
recommended_actions: Immediately patch the vulnerability by updating the HiJiffy Chatbot to the latest version if a fix is available.
Implement stricter access controls and validate user permissions for sensitive API endpoints.
Conduct a security audit to identify and address any other potential authorization flaws in the system.

description: Wecodex Restaurant CMS 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate database queries by injecting SQL code through the username parameter. Attackers can send POST requests to the login endpoint with malicious SQL payloads using boolean-based blind or time-based blind techniques to extract sensitive database information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25185.

title: Vulnerability of incorrect authorization in HiJiffy Chatbot allows an attacker to download...
description:
Vulnerability of incorrect authorization in HiJiffy Chatbot allows an attacker to download private messages from other users via the parameter 
'visitor' in '/api/v1/webchat/message'.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the HiJiffy Chatbot allows unauthorized attackers to exploit the 'visitor' parameter in the '/api/v1/webchat/message' endpoint, potentially leading to the exposure of private user messages. title: Online Store System CMS 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated...
description: Online Store System CMS 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate database queries by injecting SQL code through the email parameter. Attackers can send POST requests to index.php with the action=clientaccess parameter using boolean-based blind or time-based blind SQL injection payloads in the email field to extract sensitive database information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25203.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

nfnetlink_osf: validate...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

nfnetlink_osf: validate individual option lengths in fingerprints

nfnl_osf_add_callback() validates opt_num bounds and string
NUL-termination but does not check individual option length fields.
A zero-length option causes nf_osf_match_one() to enter the option
matching loop even when foptsize sums to zero, which matches packets
with no TCP options where ctx->optp is NULL:

 Oops: general protection fault
 KASAN: null-ptr-deref

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-23397.

title: Mattermost versions 11.2.x <= 11.2.2, 10.11.x <= 10.11.10, 11.4.x <= 11.4.0, 11.3.x <= 11.3.1...
description: Mattermost versions 11.2.x <= 11.2.2, 10.11.x <= 10.11.10, 11.4.x <= 11.4.0, 11.3.x <= 11.3.1 fail to restrict team-level access when processing membership sync from a remote cluster, which allows a malicious remote cluster to grant a user access to an entire private team instead of only the shared channel via sending crafted membership sync messages that trigger team membership assignment. Mattermost Advisory ID: MMSA-2026-00574

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4274.

title: Shipping System CMS 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated...
description: Shipping System CMS 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to bypass authentication by injecting SQL code through the username parameter. Attackers can submit malicious SQL payloads using boolean-based blind techniques in POST requests to the admin login endpoint to authenticate without valid credentials.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The SQL injection vulnerability in Shipping System CMS 1.0 allows unauthenticated attackers to bypass authentication, potentially gaining unauthorized access to sensitive data, altering database contents, or executing administrative functions. This could lead to data breaches, service disruptions, and reputational damage.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input validation and parameterized queries to sanitize user inputs and prevent SQL injection.
Restrict access to the admin login endpoint using IP whitelisting or multi-factor authentication (MFA) to mitigate unauthorized access.
Upgrade to a patched version of the software, or apply any available security patches addressing CVE-2018-25183.

title: CVE-2026-31993 - OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.22 contain an allowlist parsing mismatch vulnerability in the macO
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.22 contain an allowlist parsing mismatch vulnerability in the macOS companion app that allows authenticated operators to bypass exec approval checks. Attackers with operator.write privileges and a paired macOS beta node can craft shell-chain payloads that pass incomplete allowlist validation and execute arbitrary commands on the paired host.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-31993.

title: CVE-2026-31992 - OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.23 contain an allowlist bypass vulnerability in system.run guardra
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.23 contain an allowlist bypass vulnerability in system.run guardrails that allows authenticated operators to execute unintended commands. When /usr/bin/env is allowlisted, attackers can use env -S to bypass policy analysis and execute shell wrapper payloads at runtime.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-31992.

title: CVE-2026-31991 - OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.26 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability where Signal grou
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.26 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability where Signal group allowlist policy incorrectly accepts sender identities from DM pairing-store approvals. Attackers can exploit this boundary weakness by obtaining DM pairing approval to bypass group allowlist checks and gain unauthorized group access.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to bypass group allowlist policies in OpenClaw, potentially leading to unauthorized access to private or sensitive group communications. However, exploitation requires prior DM pairing approval, which limits the attack surface.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to OpenClaw version 2026.2.26 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Review and monitor DM pairing approvals to ensure they are granted only to trusted entities.
Implement additional monitoring and logging for group access activities to detect unauthorized access attempts.

title: CVE-2026-31990 - OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.3.2 contain a vulnerability in the stageSandboxMedia function in whi
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.3.2 contain a vulnerability in the stageSandboxMedia function in which it fails to validate destination symlinks during media staging, allowing writes to follow symlinks outside the sandbox workspace. Attackers can exploit this by placing symlinks in the media/inbound directory to overwrite arbitrary files on the host system outside sandbox boundaries.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-31990.

title: CVE-2026-31989 - OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.3.1 contain a server-side request forgery vulnerability in web_searc
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.3.1 contain a server-side request forgery vulnerability in web_search citation redirect resolution that uses a private-network-allowing SSRF policy. An attacker who can influence citation redirect targets can trigger internal-network requests from the OpenClaw host to loopback, private, or internal destinations.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-31989.

title: CVE-2026-29608 - OpenClaw 2026.3.1 contains an approval integrity vulnerability in system.run node-host execution whe
description: OpenClaw 2026.3.1 contains an approval integrity vulnerability in system.run node-host execution where argv rewriting changes command semantics. Attackers can place malicious local scripts in the working directory to execute unintended code despite operator approval of different command text.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-29608.

title: CVE-2026-29607 - OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.22 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability in allow-always w
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.22 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability in allow-always wrapper persistence that allows attackers to bypass approval checks by persisting wrapper-level allowlist entries instead of validating inner executable intent. Remote attackers can approve benign wrapped system.run commands and subsequently execute different payloads without approval, enabling remote code execution on gateway and node-host execution flows.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-29607.

title: CVE-2026-28461 - OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.3.1 contain an unbounded memory growth vulnerability in the Zalo web
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.3.1 contain an unbounded memory growth vulnerability in the Zalo webhook endpoint that allows unauthenticated attackers to trigger in-memory key accumulation by varying query strings. Remote attackers can exploit this by sending repeated requests with different query parameters to cause memory pressure, process instability, or out-of-memory conditions that degrade service availability.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28461.

title: CVE-2026-28460 - OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.22 contain an allowlist bypass vulnerability in system.run that al
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.22 contain an allowlist bypass vulnerability in system.run that allows attackers to execute non-allowlisted commands by splitting command substitution using shell line-continuation characters. Attackers can bypass security analysis by injecting $\\ followed by a newline and opening parenthesis inside double quotes, causing the shell to fold the line continuation into executable command substitution that circumvents approval boundaries.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28460.

title: CVE-2026-28449 - OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.25 lack durable replay state for Nextcloud Talk webhook events, al
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.25 lack durable replay state for Nextcloud Talk webhook events, allowing valid signed webhook requests to be replayed without suppression. Attackers can capture and replay previously valid signed webhook requests to trigger duplicate inbound message processing and cause integrity or availability issues.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28449.

title: CVE-2026-27670 - OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.3.2 contain a race condition vulnerability in ZIP extraction that al
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.3.2 contain a race condition vulnerability in ZIP extraction that allows local attackers to write files outside the intended destination directory. Attackers can exploit a time-of-check-time-of-use race between path validation and file write operations by rebinding parent directory symlinks to redirect writes outside the extraction root.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-27670.

title: CVE-2026-27566 - OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.22 contain an allowlist bypass vulnerability in system.run exec an
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.22 contain an allowlist bypass vulnerability in system.run exec analysis that fails to unwrap env and shell-dispatch wrapper chains. Attackers can route execution through wrapper binaries like env bash to smuggle payloads that satisfy allowlist entries while executing non-allowlisted commands.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-27566.

title: CVE-2026-22176 - OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.19 contain a command injection vulnerability in Windows Scheduled
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.19 contain a command injection vulnerability in Windows Scheduled Task script generation where environment variables are written to gateway.cmd using unquoted set KEY=VALUE assignments, allowing shell metacharacters to break out of assignment context. Attackers can inject arbitrary commands through environment variable values containing metacharacters like &, |, ^, %, or ! to achieve command execution when the scheduled task script is generated and executed.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-22176.

title: CVE-2026-32743 - PX4 is an open-source autopilot stack for drones and unmanned vehicles. Versions 1.17.0-rc2 and belo
description: PX4 is an open-source autopilot stack for drones and unmanned vehicles. Versions 1.17.0-rc2 and below are vulnerable to Stack-based Buffer Overflow through the MavlinkLogHandler, and are triggered via MAVLink log request. The LogEntry.filepath buffer is 60 bytes, but the sscanf function parses paths from the log list file with no width specifier, allowing a path longer than 60 characters to overflow the buffer. An attacker with MAVLink link access can trigger this by first creating deeply nested directories via MAVLink FTP, then requesting the log list. The flight controller MAVLink task crashes, losing telemetry and command capability and causing DoS. This issue has been fixed in this commit: https://github.com/PX4/PX4-Autopilot/commit/616b25a280e229c24d5cf12a03dbf248df89c474.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32743.

title: CVE-2026-32255 - Kan is an open-source project management tool. In versions 0.5.4 and below, the /api/download/attatc
description: Kan is an open-source project management tool. In versions 0.5.4 and below, the /api/download/attatchment endpoint has no authentication and no URL validation. The Attachment Download endpoint accepts a user-supplied URL query parameter and passes it directly to fetch() server-side, and returns the full response body. An unauthenticated attacker can use this to make HTTP requests from the server to internal services, cloud metadata endpoints, or private network resources. This issue has been fixed in version 0.5.5. To workaround this issue, block or restrict access to /api/download/attatchment at the reverse proxy level (nginx, Cloudflare, etc.).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32255.
